opportunities.title: Hyundai Motor Group – The 7th VH Award
opportunities.description: A global award for emerging media artists engaging with the context of Asia, featuring grants, a residency with Ars Electronica, and global exhibitions. Read more on Hyperallergic . Deadline: July 21, 2026 | vhaward.com

opportunities.title: Peters Valley School of Craft Residency
opportunities.description: This program is open to artists working in blacksmithing, ceramics, fibers, jewelry and fine metals, wood, and printmaking. Residents receive a $600 or $900 stipend to work in fully equipped studios for two or three weeks. Housing is included. There is a $10 application fee. Deadline: July 31, 2026| petersvalley.org

opportunities.title: Paul & Daisy Soros — Fellowships for New Americans 2027
opportunities.description: Up to $90,000 for immigrant & New American visual artists, architects & designers pursuing MFA, MA, PhD & other graduate degrees in any field at any accredited US institution. Read more on Hyperallergic . opportunities.title: Wave Hill — 9th Annual AnkhLave Garden Project Fellowship
opportunities.description: Now accepting applications from NYC-based, BIPOC artists. Applications are welcome from artists who work across media. Six artists will receive $1,800 stipends for the Winter Fellowship. Deadline: August 10, 2026 | wavehill.org

opportunities.title: Leeway Foundation – Art and Change Grant
opportunities.description: This grant provides up to $5,000 to fund art for social change projects by women, trans, and/or gender nonconforming artists and cultural producers living in Greater Philadelphia. Deadline: August 3, 2026 | leeway.org To feature an opportunity from your organization on Hyperallergic , get in touch at hyperallergic.com/advertise .

opportunities.title: 2026 AICA International Incentive Prize for Art Critics
opportunities.description: Critics are invited to submit a 2000–3000 essay on the theme "Art criticism and eco-socially engaged practices: new writing, new challenges?" First place will receive €2000, second place €1000, and third place €500. Deadline: August 6, 2026 | aica.org
